texto: I don't complain about the horror of life
autor: I complain about the horror of my life. The only fact I worry about is that I exist and suffer and can't even dream of being removed from my feeling of suffering.
explicacao: Citação de I complain about the horror of my life. The only fact I worry about is that I exist and suffer and can't even dream of being removed from my feeling of suffering. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't complain about the horror of life” articula reflexao, fernando-pessoa, the-book-of-disquiet em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como the-book-of-disquiet.
